\tzpentry{ID4898}{Potential Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4898 introduces Potential Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[\mathbf{V}_{node}(t) = \sum_{n=1}^{12} V_0 \sin\left( \omega_0 t + \frac{n\pi}{6} + \phi_{sync} \right) \otimes \delta_{\text{Pi}}(\Delta\theta)\]
